intro: The hospitality and finance sectors were primary targets of a concentrated wave of phishing campaigns observed between April 8 and April 20, 2026. This activity, documented in 36 reports, was dominated by high-severity threats. The threat actors FakeWallet, Storm-2755, and Tycoon 2FA were active, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893. While the impact was global, notable regional targeting affected Canada, Latin America, Mexico, and Ukraine, with the technology and travel sectors also facing significant pressure.
